title: Mongolmoyee Santoshi Maa
subTitle: Santoshi, a young devotee of Santoshi Maa, the Hindu goddess, believes her faith and devotion can get her out of every complicated situation.

title: Tui Amar Hero
subTitle: Shakyajit is in the midst of a toxic affair and lets short-lived fame get to his head. But when he marries Aarshi, a singer who sacrifices her career for her family, his life trajectory shifts.

title: Joyar Bhata
subTitle: Joyar Bhata

title: Amader Dadamoni
subTitle: At the Ray residence, Someshwar's arrival with his sisters turns sour when he encounters another groom's family and endures ridicule from the hosts.

title: Chirodini Tumi Je Amar
subTitle: Wealthy businessman Arya marries a simple 20-year-old girl, Aparna. Things take a turn for the worse when Arya's past and Aparna's bizarre visions reveal a fatal secret.

title: Parineeta
subTitle: Parul, the young girl from a village, feels desperate to prove her mettle to herself in a difficult environment. Moreover, she faces challenges from Rayan's family in order to impress him.

title: Kusum
subTitle: Kusum is gutted to lose her mother's earrings whereas Ayushman feels bad for slapping her. Later, Ayushman feels crushed to find that Shankar is resigning from his job to go back to his village.

title: Anandi
subTitle: Anandi, an aspiring doctor from a lower-middle-class family, begins working as a nurse due to her father's illness. However, things take a turn when she crosses paths with her idol, Dr Adidev Lahiri.

title: Kone Dekha Alo
subTitle: A wedding-day confusion exchanges the destinies of Bonolata and Lajbonti. This propels them into diverse societies where they uncover affection and identity.
